content.json:
This workbook depends on the **CensysRescan** logic app which is deployed with the Microsoft Sentinel Solution.</br>
Please configure this logic app first and keep it enabled in order to use this workbook.

## Censys Rescan Workbook

**Purpose**: Rescan indicators (Hosts or Web Properties) to get fresh threat intelligence from Censys.

### Setup (2 steps)
1. **Select Environment**: Choose your Subscription ID and Resource Group
2. **Choose Target Type**: Pick "Host" or "Web Property" from the filter

### Enter Target Details

**For Host Scans:**
- IP Address (e.g., 192.168.1.100)
- Port (e.g., 80)
- Protocol(e.g., HTTP)
- Transport Protocol (from dropdown)

**For Web Property Scans:**
- Domain (e.g., suspicious-site.com)
- Port (e.g., 443)

### Run Rescan
1. Click **"Run Playbook"** and select **Incident** or **Alert**
2. In the side panel, click **"Get Rescan Data"**
3. CensysRescan Logic App processes your request automatically
4. **Results Delivery**:
   - **Incident Rescan**: Comments added directly to your Incident
   - **Alert Rescan**: If alert has an associated Incident, comments added to that Incident
   - **All Results**: Data also ingested into your Log Analytics Workspace

### Important Notes
- **Comment Requirements**: No comments added if Host/Domain isn't found in the Incident
- **Progress Tracking**: Monitor Logic App status:
  - **Incident Rescan**: Check CensysRescan Logic App
  - **Alert Rescan**: Check CensysAlertRescan Logic App

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource Group
parameters.query:
Resources
| extend ResourceGroupName = resourceGroup
| distinct ResourceGroupName

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.description: Select Workspace where your incident resides

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| extend IncidentID = IncidentName
| extend IncidentNumber = toint(IncidentNumber)
| extend RunPlaybook = "Run Playbook"
| where Status != "Deleted"
| mv-expand AlertIds to typeof(string)
| join kind=leftouter (
    SecurityAlert
    | project SystemAlertId, Entities
) on $left.AlertIds == $right.SystemAlertId
| mv-expand parsedEntities = parse_json(Entities)
| extend EntityType = tostring(parsedEntities.Type)
| extend EntityValue = case(
    EntityType == "filehash", tostring(parsedEntities.Value),
    EntityType == "ip", tostring(parsedEntities.Address),
    EntityType == "dns", tostring(parsedEntities.DomainName),
    ""
)
| where EntityType in ("filehash", "ip", "dns") and isnotempty(EntityValue)
| summarize 
    FileHashes = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "filehash"), ", "),
    IPAddresses = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "ip"), ", "),
    DNSNames = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "dns"), ", "),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, Title, Severity, Status, RunPlaybook, IncidentID) 
    by IncidentNumber
| project TimeGenerated, IncidentID, IncidentNumber, FileHashes, IPAddresses, DNSNames, RunPlaybook, Title, Severity, Status
content.title: Incidents

armActionContext.description:
# Actions can potentially modify resources.
## Please use caution and include a confirmation message in this description when authoring this command.

content.query:
// Get Alerts with entities
SecurityAlert
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SystemAlertId
| extend AlertID = SystemAlertId
| extend RunPlaybook = "Run Playbook"
| where Status != "Closed"
| mv-expand parsedEntities = todynamic(Entities)
| extend EntityType = tostring(parsedEntities.Type)
| extend EntityValue = case(
                           EntityType == "filehash",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.Value),
                           EntityType == "ip",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.Address),
                           EntityType == "dns",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.DomainName),
                           ""
                       )
| where EntityType in ("filehash", "ip", "dns") and isnotempty(EntityValue)
| summarize 
    FileHashes = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "filehash"), ", "),
    IPAddresses = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "ip"), ", "),
    DNSNames = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "dns"), ", "),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, Status, VendorName, RunPlaybook)
    by AlertID
| join kind=leftouter (
    SecurityIncident
    | mv-expand AlertIds
    | extend AlertID = tostring(AlertIds)
    | summarize IncidentID = take_any(IncidentName) by AlertID
) on AlertID
| extend IncidentID = coalesce(IncidentID, "N/A")
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    AlertID,
    AlertName,
    FileHashes,
    IPAddresses,
    DNSNames,
    RunPlaybook,
    IncidentID,
    AlertSeverity,
    Status,
    VendorName
content.title: Alerts

armActionContext.description:
# Actions can potentially modify resources.
## Please use caution and include a confirmation message in this description when authoring this command.

content.json:
This workbook depends on the **CensysIOCLookup** logic app which is deployed with the Microsoft Sentinel Solution.</br>
Please configure this logic app first and keep it enabled in order to use this workbook.

## Ad-Hoc IOC Lookup Workbook

**Purpose**: Quickly investigate indicators (Host, Web Property, Certificate) without creating incidents or alerts.

### Quick Setup (3 steps)
1. **Select Environment**: Choose Subscription ID and Resource Group
2. **Choose Indicator Type**: Pick Host, Web Property, or Certificate
3. **Enter Indicator Value**: Input the IOC you want to investigate

**Indicator Format Examples:**
- **Host**: `192.168.1.100` or `10.0.0.1`
- **Web Property**: `1.1.1.1:443` or `abc.com:80` (host:port format)
- **Certificate**: Certificate fingerprint or SHA hash

### Run IOC Lookup
1. Click **"Submit"**
2. In side panel, click **"Get Ad-Hoc Lookup Data"**
3. Wait for **"Click on refresh icon to check data availability"** message
4. Click refresh icon until you see **"Click here to populate data"**
5. Click the message to view all indicator data panels


### Important Notes
- **New Environments**: First-time lookups take 10-20 minutes (Microsoft Sentinel delay)
- **Hard Refresh**: Required before each new IOC lookup for proper panel population
- **Data Range**: Results include last 1 hour only
- **Progress Tracking**: Monitor CensysIOCLookup Logic App run status for real-time progress updates

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource Group
parameters.query:
Resources
| extend ResourceGroupName = resourceGroup
| distinct ResourceGroupName

armActionContext.description:
# Actions can potentially modify resources.
## Please use caution and include a confirmation message in this description when authoring this command.

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, ip_s: string, hostname_s:string, port_d:real,fingerprint_sha256_s:string ) [];
union isfuzzy=true dummy_table, 
(Censys_Host_IOC_CL | where '{IndicatorType}' == "Host"| where ip_s == '{IndicatorValue}') , 
(Censys_Web_Property_IOC_CL | where '{IndicatorType}' == 'Web Property'| extend web_property = strcat(hostname_s,":",toint(port_d)) | where web_property == '{IndicatorValue}'),
(Censys_Certificate_IOC_CL | where '{IndicatorType}' == 'Certificate'| where fingerprint_sha256_s == '{IndicatorValue}')
| summarize count()
| extend status = case(count_ == 0 , "Click on refresh icon to check data availability","Click here to populate data.")
| project status

let dummy_main_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, ip_s: string) [];
let mainTable = union isfuzzy=true dummy_main_table, Censys_Host_IOC_CL
| where ip_s == '{IndicatorValue}'
| top 1 by TimeGenerated;
mainTable
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated,*) by ip_s
| extend
    ip = column_ifexists("ip_s", ""),
    service_count = column_ifexists("service_count_d", int(null)),
    labels = column_ifexists("labels_s", ""),
    services = column_ifexists("services_s", ""),
    dns_names = column_ifexists("dns_names_s", ""),
    dns_forward = column_ifexists("dns_forward_dns_s", ""),
    dns_reverse_names = column_ifexists("dns_reverse_dns_names_s", ""),
    asn = column_ifexists("autonomous_system_asn_d", int(null)),
    as_name = column_ifexists("autonomous_system_name_s", ""),
    city = column_ifexists("location_city_s", ""),
    province = column_ifexists("location_province_s", ""),
    postal_code = column_ifexists("location_postal_code_s", ""),
    country = column_ifexists("location_country_s", ""),
    country_code = column_ifexists("location_country_code_s", ""),
    continent = column_ifexists("location_continent_s", ""),
    latitude = column_ifexists("location_coordinates_latitude_d", real(null)),
    longitude = column_ifexists("location_coordinates_longitude_d", real(null)),
    timezone = column_ifexists("location_timezone_s", ""),
    whois_network_name = column_ifexists("whois_network_name_s", ""),
    whois_network_cidrs = column_ifexists("whois_network_cidrs_s", "")
| extend dns_names = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(dns_names,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'"','')
| extend dns_reverse_names = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(dns_reverse_names,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'"','')
| extend whois_network_cidrs = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(whois_network_cidrs,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'"','')
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    ['Host IP'] = ip,
    ['Service Count'] = service_count,
    ['ASN'] = asn,
    ['AS Name'] = as_name,
    ['DNS Names'] = dns_names,
    ['DNS Forward'] = dns_forward,
    ['DNS Reverse Names'] = dns_reverse_names,
    ['Host Labels'] = labels,
    ['City'] = city,
    ['Province'] = province,
    ['Postal Code'] = postal_code,
    ['Country'] = country,
    ['Country Code'] = country_code,
    ['Continent'] = continent,
    ['Latitude'] = latitude,
    ['Longitude'] = longitude,
    ['Timezone'] = timezone,
    ['Whois Network Name'] = whois_network_name,
    ['Whois Network CIDRs'] = whois_network_cidrs
content.title: Host Details For : {IndicatorValue}
content.noDataMessage: Refresh panel if no data is available.

content.query:
let dummy_main_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, ip_s: string) [];
let mainTable = union isfuzzy=true dummy_main_table, Censys_Host_Services_CL
| where ip_s == '{IndicatorValue}';
mainTable
| extend 
    port = column_ifexists("port_d", int(null)),
    protocol = column_ifexists("protocol_s", ""),
    transport_protocol = column_ifexists("transport_protocol_s", ""),
    scan_time = column_ifexists("scan_time_t", datetime(null))
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by port, protocol, transport_protocol
| extend 
    labels = column_ifexists("labels_s", ""),
    threats = column_ifexists("threats_s", ""),
    vulns = column_ifexists("vulns_s", "")
| extend 
    label_values = extract_all(@'"value":\s*"([^"]+)"', labels)
| extend 
    labels_csv = iff(array_length(label_values) > 0, strcat_array(label_values, ", "), "")
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    ['Port'] = port,
    ['Protocol'] = protocol,
    ['Transport Protocol'] = transport_protocol,
    ['Scan Time'] = scan_time,
    ['Labels'] = labels_csv,
    ['Threats'] = threats,
    ['Vulnerabilities'] = vulns
content.title: Service Details
content.noDataMessage: Refresh panel if no data is available.

content.query:
let dummy_main_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, ip_s: string, hostname_s:string, port_d:real, fingerprint_sha256:string) [];
let dummy_endpoint_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, hostname_s:string, port_d:real, endpoint_type_s:string, path_s:string) [];
let mainTable =  union isfuzzy=true dummy_main_table, Censys_Web_Property_IOC_CL
| extend web_property = strcat(hostname_s, ":", toint(port_d))
| where web_property == '{IndicatorValue}'
| top 1 by TimeGenerated;
let endpointsList = Censys_Web_Property_Endpoint_CL
| union isfuzzy=true dummy_endpoint_table
| extend web_property = strcat(hostname_s, ":", toint(port_d))
| where web_property == '{IndicatorValue}'
| summarize 
    endpoint_types=make_list(endpoint_type_s),
    paths=make_list(path_s),
    endpoint_details = make_list(strcat(toint(port_d), " / ", endpoint_type_s, " ", path_s))
by web_property;
mainTable
| join kind=leftouter (
    endpointsList
) on web_property
| extend software_s = column_ifexists("software_s", "[]"),
       scan_time = column_ifexists("scan_time_t", datetime(null)),
       labels = column_ifexists("labels_s", dynamic([])),
       cert_fingerprint_sha256 = column_ifexists("cert_fingerprint_sha256_s", ""),
       cert_subject_dn = column_ifexists("cert_parsed_subject_dn_s", ""),
       cert_issuer_dn = column_ifexists("cert_parsed_issuer_dn_s", ""),
       cert_common_name = column_ifexists("cert_parsed_subject_common_name_s", ""),
       cert_valid_not_before = column_ifexists("cert_parsed_validity_period_not_before_t", datetime(null)),
       cert_valid_not_after = column_ifexists("cert_parsed_validity_period_not_after_t", datetime(null)),
       cert_signature_self_signed = column_ifexists("cert_parsed_signature_self_signed_s", "")
| extend parsed_software = todynamic(software_s)
| mv-expand software = parsed_software
| summarize 
    vendors = make_list(software.vendor),
    products = make_list(software.product),
    versions = make_list(software.version),
    software_data = make_list(software) by 
    hostname_s, 
    port_d, 
    scan_time, 
    web_property, 
    labels, 
    tostring(endpoint_types), 
    tostring(paths), 
    tostring(endpoint_details), 
    cert_fingerprint_sha256, 
    cert_subject_dn, 
    cert_issuer_dn, 
    cert_common_name, 
    cert_valid_not_before, 
    cert_valid_not_after,
    cert_signature_self_signed
| extend 
    vendors = strcat_array(todynamic(vendors), ", "),
    products = strcat_array(todynamic(products), ", "),
    versions = strcat_array(todynamic(versions), ", "),
    endpoint_types = strcat_array(todynamic(endpoint_types), ", "),
    paths = strcat_array(todynamic(paths), ", "),
    endpoint_details = strcat_array(todynamic(endpoint_details), ", "),
    labels = strcat_array(todynamic(labels), ", "),
    cert_common_name = strcat_array(todynamic(cert_common_name), ", ")
| project 
    ['Hostname'] = hostname_s,
    ['Port'] = toint(port_d),
    ['Web Property'] = web_property,
    ['Scan Time'] = scan_time,
    ['Software Vendors'] = vendors,
    ['Software Products'] = products,
    ['Software Versions'] = versions,
    ['Endpoint Types'] = endpoint_types,
    ['Paths'] = paths,
    ['Endpoint Details'] = endpoint_details,
    ['Labels'] = labels,
    ['Certificate Fingerprint'] = cert_fingerprint_sha256,
    ['Certificate Subject DN'] = cert_subject_dn,
    ['Certificate Issuer DN'] = cert_issuer_dn,
    ['Certificate Common Name'] = cert_common_name,
    ['Certificate Valid From'] = cert_valid_not_before,
    ['Certificate Valid To'] = cert_valid_not_after,
    ['Certificate Signature Self Signed'] = cert_signature_self_signed
content.title: Web Property Details For : {IndicatorValue}
content.noDataMessage: Refresh panel if no data is available.

content.query:
let dummy_main_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, hostname_s:string, port_d:real, id_s:string) [];
let mainTable = union isfuzzy=true dummy_main_table, Censys_Web_Property_Vuln_CL
| extend web_property = strcat(hostname_s, ":", toint(port_d))
| where web_property == '{IndicatorValue}'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by hostname_s, port_d, id_s
;
mainTable
| extend 
    hostname_s = column_ifexists("hostname_s", ""),
    port_d = column_ifexists("port_d", real(0)),
    source_s = column_ifexists("source_s", ""),
    metrics_cvss_v31_score_d = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_score_d", real(0)), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_score_d", real(0)), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_score_d", real(0))),
    id_s = column_ifexists("id_s", ""),
    name_s = column_ifexists("name_s", ""),
    severity_s = column_ifexists("severity_s", ""),
    confidence_d = column_ifexists("confidence_d", real(0)),
    year_d = column_ifexists("year_d", int(0)),
    risk_source_s = column_ifexists("risk_source_s", ""),
    metrics_epss_score_d = column_ifexists("metrics_epss_score_d", real(0)),
    metrics_epss_percentile_d = column_ifexists("metrics_epss_percentile_d", real(0)),
    // CVSS Vector - coalesce across all versions
    metrics_cvss_v31_vector_s = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_vector_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_vector_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_vector_s", "")),
    // CVSS Components - coalesce across all versions
    metrics_cvss_v31_attack_vector_s = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_components_attack_vector_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_components_attack_vector_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_attack_vector_s", "")),
    metrics_cvss_v31_attack_complexity_s = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_components_attack_complexity_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_components_attack_complexity_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_attack_complexity_s", "")),
    metrics_cvss_v31_privileges_required_s = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_components_privileges_required_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_components_privileges_required_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_privileges_required_s", "")),
    metrics_cvss_v31_user_interaction_s = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_components_user_interaction_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_components_user_interaction_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_user_interaction_s", "")),
    metrics_cvss_v31_scope_s = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_components_scope_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_components_scope_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_scope_s", "")),
    metrics_cvss_v31_confidentiality_s = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_components_confidentiality_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_components_confidentiality_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_confidentiality_s", "")),
    metrics_cvss_v31_integrity_s = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_components_integrity_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_components_integrity_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_integrity_s", "")),
    metrics_cvss_v31_availability_s = coalesce(column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v31_components_availability_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v30_components_availability_s", ""), column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_availability_s", "")),
    // Additional CVSS v40 specific fields
    metrics_cvss_v40_attack_requirements_s = column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_attack_requirements_s", ""),
    metrics_cvss_v40_automatable_s = column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_automatable_s", ""),
    metrics_cvss_v40_provider_urgency_s = column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_provider_urgency_s", ""),
    metrics_cvss_v40_recovery_s = column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_recovery_s", ""),
    metrics_cvss_v40_safety_s = column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_safety_s", ""),
    metrics_cvss_v40_value_density_s = column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_value_density_s", ""),
    metrics_cvss_v40_vulnerability_response_effort_s = column_ifexists("metrics_cvss_v40_components_vulnerability_response_effort_s", ""),
    kev_s = column_ifexists("kev_s", dynamic([])),
    evidence_s = column_ifexists("evidence_s", dynamic([]))
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    ['CVE ID'] = id_s,
    ['Vulnerability Name'] = name_s,
    ['Hostname'] = hostname_s,
    ['Port'] = toint(port_d),
    ['Severity'] = severity_s,
    ['Confidence'] = confidence_d,
    ['Web Property'] = web_property,
    ['Source'] = source_s,
    ['Year'] = year_d,
    ['Risk Source'] = risk_source_s,
    ['CVSS Score'] = metrics_cvss_v31_score_d,
    ['KEV'] = kev_s,
    ['Evidence'] = evidence_s,
    ['Metrics EPSS Score'] = metrics_epss_score_d,
    ['Metrics EPSS Percentile'] = metrics_epss_percentile_d,
    ['Metrics CVSS Vector'] = metrics_cvss_v31_vector_s,
    ['Metrics Attack Vector'] = metrics_cvss_v31_attack_vector_s,
    ['Metrics Attack Complexity'] = metrics_cvss_v31_attack_complexity_s,
    ['Metrics Privileges Required'] = metrics_cvss_v31_privileges_required_s,
    ['Metrics User Interaction'] = metrics_cvss_v31_user_interaction_s,
    ['Metrics Scope'] = metrics_cvss_v31_scope_s,
    ['Metrics Confidentiality Impact'] = metrics_cvss_v31_confidentiality_s,
    ['Metrics Integrity Impact'] = metrics_cvss_v31_integrity_s,
    ['Metrics Availability Impact'] = metrics_cvss_v31_availability_s,
    // CVSS v40 specific fields
    ['Metrics Attack Requirements'] = metrics_cvss_v40_attack_requirements_s,
    ['Metrics Automatable'] = metrics_cvss_v40_automatable_s,
    ['Metrics Provider Urgency'] = metrics_cvss_v40_provider_urgency_s,
    ['Metrics Recovery'] = metrics_cvss_v40_recovery_s,
    ['Metrics Safety'] = metrics_cvss_v40_safety_s,
    ['Metrics Value Density'] = metrics_cvss_v40_value_density_s,
    ['Metrics Vulnerability Response Effort'] = metrics_cvss_v40_vulnerability_response_effort_s
content.title: Vulnerability Details
content.noDataMessage: Refresh panel if no data is available.

content.query:
let dummy_main_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, hostname_s: string, port_d: real, id_s:string) [];
let mainTable = union isfuzzy=true dummy_main_table, Censys_Web_Property_Threat_CL
| extend web_property = strcat(hostname_s, ":", toint(port_d))
| where web_property == '{IndicatorValue}'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by hostname_s, port_d, id_s;
mainTable
| extend 
    actors = column_ifexists("actors_s", ""),
    confidence = column_ifexists("confidence_d", real(null)),
    evidence = column_ifexists("evidence_s", ""),
    id = column_ifexists("id_s", ""),
    malware = column_ifexists("malware_s", ""),
    name = column_ifexists("name_s", ""),
    source = column_ifexists("source_s", ""),
    tactic = column_ifexists("tactic_s", ""),
    type = column_ifexists("type_s", ""),
    hostname = column_ifexists("hostname_s", ""),
    port = column_ifexists("port_d", int(null)),
    details_campaign_id = column_ifexists("details_campaign_id_s", ""),
    details_campaign_theme = column_ifexists("details_campaign_theme_s", ""),
    details_control_servers = column_ifexists("details_control_servers_s", ""),
    details_version = column_ifexists("details_version_s", ""),
    malware_all_names = column_ifexists("malware_all_names_s", ""),
    malware_id = column_ifexists("malware_id_s", ""),
    malware_last_updated_at = column_ifexists("malware_last_updated_at_t", datetime(null)),
    malware_malpedia_id = column_ifexists("malware_malpedia_id_s", ""),
    malware_primary_name = column_ifexists("malware_primary_name_s", "")
| extend type = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(type,',',", "),'"',""),"]",""),"[","")
| extend tactic = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(tactic,',',", "),'"',""),"]",""),"[","")
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    ['Hostname'] = hostname,
    ['Port'] = port,
    ['Threat ID'] = id,
    ['Threat Name'] = name,
    ['Threat Type'] = type,
    ['Source'] = source,
    ['Confidence'] = confidence,
    ['Tactic'] = tactic,
    ['Actors'] = actors,
    ['Malware'] = malware,
    ['Evidence'] = evidence,
    ['Details - Campaign ID'] = details_campaign_id,
    ['Details - Campaign Theme'] = details_campaign_theme,
    ['Details - Control Servers'] = details_control_servers,
    ['Details - Version'] = details_version,
    ['Malware - All Names'] = malware_all_names,
    ['Malware - ID'] = malware_id,
    ['Malware - Last Updated'] = malware_last_updated_at,
    ['Malware - Malpedia ID'] = malware_malpedia_id,
    ['Malware - Primary Name'] = malware_primary_name
content.title: Threat Details
content.noDataMessage: Refresh panel if no data is available.

content.query:
let dummy_main_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, fingerprint_sha256_s: string) [];
let mainTable = union isfuzzy=true dummy_main_table, Censys_Certificate_IOC_CL
| where fingerprint_sha256_s == '{IndicatorValue}'
| top 1 by TimeGenerated;
mainTable
| extend
    fingerprint_sha256_ext = column_ifexists("fingerprint_sha256_s", ""),
    valid_to = column_ifexists("valid_to_t", datetime(null)),
    self_signed = column_ifexists("self_signed_b", ""),
    subject_dn = column_ifexists("parsed_subject_dn_s", ""),
    issuer_dn = column_ifexists("parsed_issuer_dn_s", ""),
    subject_common_name = column_ifexists("parsed_subject_common_name_s", ""),
    validity_not_before = column_ifexists("parsed_validity_period_not_before_t", datetime(null)),
    validity_not_after = column_ifexists("parsed_validity_period_not_after_t", datetime(null)),
    signature_self_signed = column_ifexists("parsed_signature_self_signed_b", "")
| extend subject_common_name = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(subject_common_name,',',", "),'"',""),"]",""),"[","")
| project 
    ['Fingerprint SHA256'] = fingerprint_sha256_ext,
    ['Subject DN'] = subject_dn,
    ['Issuer DN'] = issuer_dn,
    ['Subject Common Name'] = subject_common_name,
    ['Valid Not Before'] = validity_not_before,
    ['Valid Not After'] = validity_not_after,
    ['Self Signed (Signature)'] = signature_self_signed,
    ['Valid To'] = valid_to,
    ['Self Signed'] = self_signed
content.title: Certificate Details For : {IndicatorValue}
content.noDataMessage: Refresh panel if no data is available.

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| where ModifiedBy contains "playbook - censys" 
| count

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| where ModifiedBy contains "playbook - censys" 
| project TimeGenerated, IncidentName, IncidentNumber, IncidentUrl, Title, Severity, Status, ProviderIncidentId, ProviderName, CreatedTime, LastModifiedTime, FirstActivityTime, AlertIds, Comments, AdditionalData, ModifiedBy, Type

content.query:
let dummyData = datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, incident_arm_id_s:string, type_s:string, ip_s:string)[];
 union isfuzzy=true dummyData, Incident_Enrich_Data_CL
| where type_s == "host" and isnotempty(ip_s)
| where incident_arm_id_s contains '{IncidentName}'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by type_s, ip_s
| extend 
    autonomous_system_name_s = column_ifexists("autonomous_system_name_s", ""),
    autonomous_system_asn_s = column_ifexists("autonomous_system_asn_s", ""),
    whois_network_name_s = column_ifexists("whois_network_name_s", ""),
    whois_network_cidrs_s = column_ifexists("whois_network_cidrs_s", ""),
    location_city_s = column_ifexists("location_city_s", ""),
    location_postal_code_s = column_ifexists("location_postal_code_s", ""),
    location_province_s = column_ifexists("location_province_s", ""),
    location_country_s = column_ifexists("location_country_s", ""),
    location_country_code_s = column_ifexists("location_country_code_s", ""),
    location_continent_s = column_ifexists("location_continent_s", ""),
    location_coordinates_latitude_d = column_ifexists("location_coordinates_latitude_d", real(null)),
    location_coordinates_longitude_d = column_ifexists("location_coordinates_longitude_d", real(null)),
    dns_names_s = column_ifexists("dns_names_s", ""),
    reverse_dns_names_s = column_ifexists("reverse_dns_names_s", ""),
    forward_dns_names_s = column_ifexists("forward_dns_names_s", ""),
    service_count_d = column_ifexists("service_count_d", int(null)),
    labels_s = column_ifexists("labels_s", ""),
    services_s = column_ifexists("services_s", ""),
    playbook_s = column_ifexists("playbook_s", "")
| extend whois_network_cidrs_s = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(whois_network_cidrs_s,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'\"','')
| extend dns_names_s = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(dns_names_s,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'\"','')
| extend reverse_dns_names_s = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(reverse_dns_names_s,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'\"','')
| extend forward_dns_names_s = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(forward_dns_names_s,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'\"','')
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    ['Type'] = type_s,
    ['IP Address'] = ip_s,
    ['Autonomous System Name'] = autonomous_system_name_s,
    ['Autonomous System ASN'] = autonomous_system_asn_s,
    ['Whois Network Name'] = whois_network_name_s,
    ['Whois Network CIDRs'] = whois_network_cidrs_s,
    ['Services'] = services_s,
    ['Location City'] = location_city_s,
    ['Location Postal Code'] = location_postal_code_s,
    ['Location Province'] = location_province_s,
    ['Location Country'] = location_country_s,
    ['Location Country Code'] = location_country_code_s,
    ['Location Continent'] = location_continent_s,
    ['Location Latitude'] = location_coordinates_latitude_d,
    ['Location Longitude'] = location_coordinates_longitude_d,
    ['DNS Names'] = dns_names_s,
    ['Reverse DNS Names'] = reverse_dns_names_s,
    ['Forward DNS Names'] = forward_dns_names_s,
    ['Service Count'] = service_count_d,
    ['Labels'] = labels_s,
    ['Incident ARM ID'] = incident_arm_id_s,
    ['Playbook'] = playbook_s
content.title: Host Enrichment Details For Incident : {IncidentName}

content.query:
let dummyData = datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, incident_arm_id_s:string, type_s:string, hostname_s:string, port_d:real)[];
union isfuzzy=true dummyData, Incident_Enrich_Data_CL
| where type_s == "web property" and isnotempty(hostname_s)
| where incident_arm_id_s contains '{IncidentName}'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by type_s, hostname_s, port_d
| extend 
    endpoints_s = column_ifexists("endpoints_s", ""),
    labels_s = column_ifexists("labels_s", ""),
    threats_s = column_ifexists("threats_s", ""),
    vulns_s = column_ifexists("vulns_s", ""),
    scan_time_t = column_ifexists("scan_time_t", datetime(null)),
    software_s = column_ifexists("software_s", ""),
    fingerprint_sha256_s = column_ifexists("fingerprint_sha256_s", ""),
    subject_common_name_s = column_ifexists("subject_common_name_s", ""),
    subject_dn_s = column_ifexists("subject_dn_s", ""),
    issuer_dn_s = column_ifexists("issuer_dn_s", ""),
    validity_period_not_after_t = column_ifexists("validity_period_not_after_t", datetime(null)),
    validity_period_not_before_t = column_ifexists("validity_period_not_before_t", datetime(null)),
    signature_self_signed_t = column_ifexists("signature_self_signed_t", ""),
    playbook_s = column_ifexists("playbook_s", "")
| extend threats_s = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(threats_s,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'\"','')
| extend subject_common_name_s = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(subject_common_name_s,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'\"','')
| extend 
    software_clean = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(software_s, '},{', '|'), '},{', '|'), '"', ''),
    vendors = extract_all(@'"Vendor":"([^"]+)"', software_s),
    products = extract_all(@'"Product":"([^"]+)"', software_s),
    versions = extract_all(@'"Version":"([^"]+)"', software_s)
| extend 
    VendorsCSV = iff(isempty(vendors), "", strcat_array(vendors, ", ")),
    ProductsCSV = iff(isempty(products), "", strcat_array(products, ", ")),
    VersionsCSV = iff(isempty(versions), "", strcat_array(versions, ", "))
| extend EndpointsTypePath = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(endpoints_s,'{"Endpoint Type":"',''),'","Path":"',' '),'"}',''),'},{',', '),'[',''),']',''),'"',''), ",",", ")
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    ['Type'] = type_s,
    ['Hostname'] = hostname_s,
    ['Port'] = port_d,
    ['Endpoints Type/Path']=EndpointsTypePath,
    ['Labels'] = labels_s,
    ['Threats'] = threats_s,
    ['Vulnerabilities'] = vulns_s,
    ['Scan Time'] = scan_time_t,
    ['Software Vendors'] = VendorsCSV,
    ['Software Products'] = ProductsCSV,
    ['Software Versions'] = VersionsCSV,
    ['Fingerprint SHA256'] = fingerprint_sha256_s,
    ['Subject Common Name'] = subject_common_name_s,
    ['Subject DN'] = subject_dn_s,
    ['Issuer DN'] = issuer_dn_s,
    ['Incident ARM ID'] = incident_arm_id_s,
    ['Validity Period Not After'] = validity_period_not_after_t,
    ['Validity Period Not Before'] = validity_period_not_before_t,
    ['Signature Self Signed'] = signature_self_signed_t,
    ['Playbook'] = playbook_s
content.title: Web Property Enrichment Details For Incident : {IncidentName}

content.query:
let dummyData = datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, incident_arm_id_s:string, type_s:string, fingerprint_sha256_s:string)[];
union isfuzzy=true dummyData, Incident_Enrich_Data_CL
| where type_s == "certificate" and isnotempty(fingerprint_sha256_s)
| where incident_arm_id_s contains '{IncidentName}'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by type_s, fingerprint_sha256_s
| extend 
    parsed_subject_dn_s = column_ifexists("parsed_subject_dn_s", ""),
    parsed_issuer_dn_s = column_ifexists("parsed_issuer_dn_s", ""),
    parsed_subject_common_name_s = column_ifexists("parsed_subject_common_name_s", ""),
    parsed_validity_period_not_before_t = column_ifexists("parsed_validity_period_not_before_t", datetime(null)),
    parsed_validity_period_not_after_t = column_ifexists("parsed_validity_period_not_after_t", datetime(null)),
    parsed_signature_self_signed_s = column_ifexists("parsed_signature_self_signed_s", ""),
    valid_to_t = column_ifexists("valid_to_t", datetime(null)),
    self_signed_s = column_ifexists("self_signed_s", ""),
    playbook_s = column_ifexists("playbook_s", "")
| extend parsed_subject_common_name_s = replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(replace_string(parsed_subject_common_name_s,']',''),'[',''),',',', '),'\"','')
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    ['Type'] = type_s,
    ['Fingerprint SHA256'] = fingerprint_sha256_s,
    ['Subject DN'] = parsed_subject_dn_s,
    ['Issuer DN'] = parsed_issuer_dn_s,
    ['Subject Common Name'] = parsed_subject_common_name_s,
    ['Validity Period Not Before'] = parsed_validity_period_not_before_t,
    ['Validity Period Not After'] = parsed_validity_period_not_after_t,
    ['Signature Self Signed'] = parsed_signature_self_signed_s,
    ['Incident ARM ID'] = incident_arm_id_s,
    ['Valid To'] = valid_to_t,
    ['Self Signed'] = self_signed_s,
    ['Playbook'] = playbook_s

content.json:
This workbook depends on the **CensysHostHistory** logic app which is deployed with the Microsoft Sentinel Solution.</br>
Please configure this logic app first and keep it enabled in order to use this workbook.

## Censys Host History Workbook

**Purpose**: Pull historical data for a specific host to investigate past activity and changes over time.

### Setup (2 steps)
1. **Select Environment**: Choose your Subscription ID and Resource Group
2. **Enter Time Range & Target**:
   - **Start Time**: When to begin data collection (e.g., 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z)
   - **End Time**: When to stop data collection (e.g., 2026-01-02T00:00:00Z)
   - **Host**: Target IP address

**Time Format Tips:**
- Use format: YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00Z
- Example: Jan 1, 2026 → 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z
- For full day data: Set end time to next day's start

### Run History Pull
1. Click **"Submit"** (activates when all fields are filled)
2. In side panel, click **"Get Host History Data"**
3. CensysHostHistory Logic App processes your request
4. Data appears in your Log Analytics Workspace

### What You Get
- Complete host activity history for your time range up to 1000 events.

### Important Notes
- **Processing Time**: Larger time ranges require more processing time
- **Data Destination**: Results are sent to Log Analytics Workspace
- **Progress Tracking**: Monitor CensysHostHistory Logic App run status for real-time progress updates
- **Record Limits**: If more than 1,000 records exist, only the first 1,000 are displayed in the workbook. Use Censys platform for complete dataset exploration

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource Group
parameters.query:
Resources
| extend ResourceGroupName = resourceGroup
| distinct ResourceGroupName

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.label: Start Time
parameters.description: Start Time For Host History data to lookup for

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.label: End Time
parameters.description: End Time For Host History data to lookup for

parameters.name: host
parameters.label: Host
parameters.description: IP Address for host which history should be fetch

armActionContext.description:
# Actions can potentially modify resources.
## Please use caution and include a confirmation message in this description when authoring this command.

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, ip_s: string, event_time_t:datetime) [];
union isfuzzy=true dummy_table, 
(Censys_Host_History_Data_CL | where ip_s == "{host}" and start_time_t == datetime("{start_time}") and end_time_t == datetime("{end_time}"))
| summarize count()
| extend status = case(count_ == 0 , "Click on refresh icon to check data availability","Click here to populate data.")
| project status

Censys_Host_History_Data_CL
| where ip_s == "{host}" and start_time_t == datetime("{start_time}") and end_time_t == datetime("{end_time}")
| project ["Event Time"]=event_time_s, ["Event History"]=ui_link_s, ["Resource Type"]=resource_type_s, ["Resource Details"]=display_data_s
content.title: Host History

formatOptions.linkLabel: View Host History on Censys Platform

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, alert_id_g: string, ip_s:string, incident_arm_id_s: string, dns_names_s: string, reverse_dns_names_s: string, services_s: string, service_count_d: real, location_city_s: string, location_country_s: string, location_province_s: string, location_postal_code_s: string, location_continent_s: string, location_coordinates_latitude_d: real, location_coordinates_longitude_d: real, whois_network_cidrs_s: string, whois_network_name_s: string, autonomous_system_asn_s: string, autonomous_system_name_s: string, type_s: string) [];
union isfuzzy=true dummy_table,
Incident_Enrich_Data_CL
| where isnotempty(alert_id_g)
| where type_s == "host"
| join kind=leftouter (SecurityAlert
| project SystemAlertId, Entities, TimeGenerated
| mv-expand parsedEntities = todynamic(Entities)
| extend EntityType = todynamic(parsedEntities.Type)
| extend EntityValue = case(
                           EntityType == "filehash",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.Value),
                           EntityType == "ip",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.Address),
                           EntityType == "dns",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.DomainName),
                           ""
                       )
| where EntityType in ("filehash", "ip", "dns") and isnotempty(EntityValue)
| summarize 
    FileHashes = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "filehash"), ", "),
    IPAddresses = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "ip"), ", "),
    DNSNames = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "dns"), ", "),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, *)
    by SystemAlertId
) on $left.alert_id_g == $right.SystemAlertId
| where isnotempty(SystemAlertId)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SystemAlertId, ip_s
| project TimeGenerated, SystemAlertId, IP=ip_s, ["Incident ARM ID"]=incident_arm_id_s, ["DNS Names"]=dns_names_s, ["Reverse DNS Names"]=reverse_dns_names_s, Services=services_s, ["Service Count"]=service_count_d, City=location_city_s, Country=location_country_s, Province=location_province_s, ["Postal Code"]=location_postal_code_s, Continent=location_continent_s, Latitude=location_coordinates_latitude_d, Longitude=location_coordinates_longitude_d, CIDRs=whois_network_cidrs_s, ["Network Name"]=whois_network_name_s, ASN=autonomous_system_asn_s, Name=autonomous_system_name_s
content.title: Alert Enrichment for Host Entities

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, alert_id_g: string, hostname_s: string, port_d: real, incident_arm_id_s: string, software_s: string, threats_s: string, vulns_s: string, endpoints_s: string, fingerprint_sha256_s: string, subject_dn_s: string, issuer_dn_s: string, subject_common_name_s: string, validity_period_not_before_t: datetime, validity_period_not_after_t: datetime, scan_time_t: datetime, type_s: string) [];
union isfuzzy=true dummy_table,
Incident_Enrich_Data_CL
| where isnotempty(alert_id_g)
| where type_s == "web property"
| join kind=leftouter (SecurityAlert
| project SystemAlertId, Entities, TimeGenerated
| mv-expand parsedEntities = todynamic(Entities)
| extend EntityType = tostring(parsedEntities.Type)
| extend EntityValue = case(
                           EntityType == "filehash",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.Value),
                           EntityType == "ip",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.Address),
                           EntityType == "dns",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.DomainName),
                           ""
                       )
| where EntityType in ("filehash", "ip", "dns") and isnotempty(EntityValue)
| summarize 
    FileHashes = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "filehash"), ", "),
    IPAddresses = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "ip"), ", "),
    DNSNames = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "dns"), ", "),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, *)
    by SystemAlertId
) on $left.alert_id_g == $right.SystemAlertId
| where isnotempty(SystemAlertId)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SystemAlertId, hostname_s, port_d
| project TimeGenerated, SystemAlertId, Host=hostname_s, Port=port_d, ["Incident ARM ID"]=incident_arm_id_s, Software=software_s, Threat=threats_s, Vulnerabilities=vulns_s, Endpoint=endpoints_s, SHA256=fingerprint_sha256_s, ["Subject DN"]=subject_dn_s, ["Issuer DN"]=issuer_dn_s, ["Subject Common name"]=subject_common_name_s, ["Not Before Period"]=validity_period_not_before_t, ["Not After period"]=validity_period_not_after_t, ["Scan Time"]=scan_time_t
content.title: Alert Enrichment for WebProperty Entities

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, alert_id_g: string, incident_arm_id_s: string, fingerprint_sha256_s: string, parsed_subject_dn_s: string, parsed_issuer_dn_s: string, parsed_subject_common_name_s: string, parsed_validity_period_not_before_t: datetime, parsed_validity_period_not_after_t: datetime, parsed_signature_self_signed_b: bool, type_s: string) [];
union isfuzzy=true dummy_table,
Incident_Enrich_Data_CL
| where isnotempty(alert_id_g)
| where type_s == "certificate"
| join kind=leftouter (SecurityAlert
| project SystemAlertId, Entities, TimeGenerated
| mv-expand parsedEntities = todynamic(Entities)
| extend EntityType = tostring(parsedEntities.Type)
| extend EntityValue = case(
                           EntityType == "filehash",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.Value),
                           EntityType == "ip",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.Address),
                           EntityType == "dns",
                           tostring(parsedEntities.DomainName),
                           ""
                       )
| where EntityType in ("filehash", "ip", "dns") and isnotempty(EntityValue)
| summarize 
    FileHashes = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "filehash"), ", "),
    IPAddresses = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "ip"), ", "),
    DNSNames = strcat_array(make_set_if(EntityValue, EntityType == "dns"), ", "),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, *)
    by SystemAlertId
) on $left.alert_id_g == $right.SystemAlertId
| where isnotempty(SystemAlertId)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SystemAlertId, fingerprint_sha256_s
| project TimeGenerated, SystemAlertId, SHA256=fingerprint_sha256_s, ["Incident ARM ID"]=incident_arm_id_s, ["Subject DN"]=parsed_subject_dn_s, ["Issuer DN"]=parsed_issuer_dn_s, ["Subject Common name"]=parsed_subject_common_name_s, ["Not Before Period"]=parsed_validity_period_not_before_t, ["Not After period"]=parsed_validity_period_not_after_t, ["Self Signed"]=parsed_signature_self_signed_b
